programme.title: The Life & Disappearance of Amelia Earhart
programme.desc: Daredevil pilot, global adventurer, gone. The mystery of Amelia Earhart's fate endures.

programme.title: The Beatles: The Sound of a Revolution
programme.desc: Explore the band that revolutionized music! Rare footage & iconic performances define their legacy.

programme.title: Behind the Lyrics: The Beatles
programme.desc: The Beatles made love a legacy, romantic, raw, and timeless. Their songs still speak to us today.

programme.title: Emerald Storm
programme.desc: Follow Ireland's top MTB riders as they rise from local trails to the world stage.

programme.title: Isolated
programme.desc: Five world class surfers travel to New Guinea in search of undiscovered waves, but end up discovering so much more.

programme.title: And Two If By Sea
programme.desc: The story of iconic professional surfers and identical twins CJ & Damien Hobgood. Their sibling rivalry and struggle to each establish their own identity fueled their careers, but ripped their personal and peripheral relationships apart.

programme.title: The Power of Pickleball
programme.desc: A heartfelt documentary detailing how a backyard game from 1965 became a bold movement uniting generations.

programme.title: Sweet Micky for President
programme.desc: Music and politics collide when music star, Pras Michel of the Fugees, returns to his homeland of Haiti.

programme.title: The Reverend
programme.desc: An intimate portrait of Reverend Vince Anderson's spiritual and musical journey.

programme.title: A Man Imagined
programme.desc: An intimate and hallucinatory portrait of a man with schizophrenia surviving amidst urban detritus and decay.

programme.title: Hummingbirds
programme.desc: Silvia and Beba tell their own coming-of-age story in their hometown on the Texas-Mexico border.

programme.title: The Spiritual Advisor
programme.desc: Spiritual advisor Jeff Hood travels to Oklahoma to fight for the stay of an incarcerated man’s execution.

programme.title: California Dreams
programme.desc: Through auditions across Southern California, the film portrays real people with big Hollywood aspirations.

programme.title: Down in Shadowland
programme.desc: A five year project involving filming on NYC subway.

programme.title: Charm Circle
programme.desc: A powerful portrait of an eccentric family navigating the chaos that both ties and divides them.

programme.title: Sex and Broadcasting
programme.desc: A human, and humorous, look at New Jersey’s WFMU, a radio station that refuses any programming boundaries.

programme.title: Charm Circle
programme.desc: A powerful portrait of an eccentric family navigating the chaos that both ties and divides them.
